Correct repair is to use a 1D complex input of length >1 to expose structural difference, but per doc, the fundamental behavior differs: as_real is 'complex-to-real reinterpretation' (interleaved real/imag), while real is 'projection to real part'. They are functionally incompatible. However, the error shows shape (1,2) vs (1,) — confirming this semantic gap. Since docs confirm different purposes (as_real for dtype conversion, real for projection), operation is 'skip'.
